body.title: [dependency] CC shim gates 'available?' on tmux reachability; 10-min backoff on no-builder
body.intention: I intend that CC advertises itself available only when its shim can actually reach it (in a tmux window), and that a no-builder-found outcome makes Granny back off for 10 minutes before re-polling — so Granny never routes to an unreachable CC and never hot-loops when no builder is up.
body.description:
PHASE 2 (of D-granny-pull-dispatch-model). Two coupled reconciliation PARTIALs: (a) CC shim reachability — _tmux_session_exists EXISTS (worker_shim.py:223-228) but is only surfaced in self_test (worker_shim.py:170-180); it does NOT gate the availability answer, which is a static touch-flag set at listener start (worker_shim.py:230-234). Wire reachability to gate availability: no tmux window -> not available. (b) Backoff — GRANNY_BUILDER_COOLDOWN_S=600 EXISTS (daemon.py:417) but is applied ONLY after a dispatch-ack timeout (daemon.py:570); there is no backoff on a 'no builder found' outcome (today it goes straight to the stall/park path daemon.py:919-929). Apply a 10-min backoff-before-re-poll on the no-builder outcome.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/claude/worker_shim.py (gate availability on _tmux_session_exists), unseen_university/devices/granny/daemon.py (no-builder backoff path), unseen_university/devices/granny/availability.py (cooldown helpers).
**Design rules:** log-every-state-change (availability + backoff transitions at INFO); no-sqlite.
**Scope boundary:** IN — reachability-gated CC availability + no-builder 10-min backoff. OUT — the alarm raised when backoff exhausts (T-no-builders-alarm-done-right), the poll/pull redesign (T-converge).
**Test plan:** CC shim with no tmux session reports unavailable (red: available anyway; green: not available); a no-builder poll sets a 600s backoff before the next re-poll (red: immediate re-poll; green: backoff observed).
**Completion criteria:** CC availability answer is false when not in a tmux window; a no-builder outcome triggers a 10-min backoff before re-poll.
**Rollback:** revert — CC availability returns to static flag; Granny drops straight to stall on no-builder.
